meta.title: SwiftBill — Professional Invoicing for Freelancers & Small Businesses
meta.description: Create, send, and track professional invoices in seconds. 15 PDF templates, AI-powered document generation, ZATCA & UAE FTA compliance. Download free on the App Store.
meta.ogDescription: Professional invoicing app for freelancers. 15 templates, AI generation, multi-currency support.

hero.title: Professional invoices
hero.subtitle: Create, customize, and send beautiful invoices with 15 PDF templates, AI-powered generation, and built-in tax compliance. Get paid faster — from anywhere.
hero.cta: Download Free on the App Store

features.label: Features
features.title: Everything you need to get paid
features.subtitle: SwiftBill gives freelancers and small businesses the tools to create professional invoices, track payments, and manage expenses — all from your iPhone.

templates.title: 15 Beautiful PDF Templates
templates.description: From Classic to Executive — choose a template that matches your brand. Every template is professionally designed with clean typography and proper layout.

ai.title: AI-Powered Generation
ai.description: Describe what you need in plain text and SwiftBill creates the complete invoice. Smart autofill, receipt OCR, and AI-generated contracts save you hours.

compliance.title: Tax Compliance Built In
compliance.description: ZATCA Phase 1 QR codes for Saudi Arabia, UAE FTA format, VAT calculations, and bilingual Arabic-English invoices — all generated automatically.

multicurrency.title: 22 Currencies Supported
multicurrency.description: Invoice clients in their local currency. SAR, AED, USD, EUR, GBP and 17 more — with proper formatting and exchange display.

expenses.title: Expense Tracking
expenses.description: Capture receipts with your camera, categorize expenses, and track reimbursements. See your profit at a glance with visual reports.

recurring.title: Recurring Invoices
recurring.description: Set it and forget it. Automatic invoice generation on your schedule — weekly, monthly, quarterly, or yearly. Never miss a billing cycle.

compliance.label: Tax Compliance
compliance.title: Built for the Gulf Region
compliance.subtitle: SwiftBill generates legally valid tax invoices with the compliance features your country requires.

zatca.title: ZATCA Phase 1 Compliant
zatca.subtitle: Saudi Arabia
zatca.description: Automatic QR code generation with TLV encoding, Arabic and bilingual invoice formats, VAT calculations, and seller/buyer tax registration numbers.

uae.title: UAE FTA Tax Invoice Format
uae.subtitle: United Arab Emirates
uae.description: Federal Tax Authority compliant format with TRN display, proper VAT treatment, English and Arabic variants for all business needs.

templates.label: Templates
templates.title: 15 Professional Templates
templates.subtitle: Choose the perfect look for your business. Every template is designed for clarity, professionalism, and impact.
templates.cta: See All Templates in the App

pricing.label: Pricing
pricing.title: Simple, transparent pricing
pricing.subtitle: Start free. Upgrade when you're ready to unlock everything.

cta.title: Ready to get paid faster?
cta.subtitle: Join thousands of freelancers who trust SwiftBill for professional invoicing.
cta.button: Download Free on the App Store
cta.note: Free to start. No credit card required.

footer.tagline: Professional invoicing for freelancers and small businesses.
footer.madeWith: Made with care for freelancers worldwide.

blog.title: Blog
blog.subtitle: Tips, guides, and updates for freelancers and small businesses.
